text: So, starting from the front door.
Airlock is something we always neglect. What are we doing in there?
What are we doing in the airlock?
I mean, the challenge is always we need bright lights. We can't do too much. There's not much space.
So, I haven't thought through too much in the specific airlock.
But we had...
But Siobhan's idea here was that when you come in, you play with people's old ideas of voodoo.
You actually have a voodoo doll.
And you have the kind of thing where you get people to think about their possible preconceptions.
And then on the inside, you take away the voodoo doll.
So, you're moving away from that sort of thing.
But that would be interesting to play with.
Tech-wise, it would be nice to have a cyberpunk-y kind of feel.
How do we make that feel like some weird cyberpunk booth space?
There might be a mask or something that sits there.
So, it would be interesting to use one of the backdrops of things.
That might be interesting.
But yeah.
So, there's more work on what actually should happen at the very front door.
That would be nice.
